rationale: This live-action "POV rushing home" hook shows zero gameplay and explicitly references a different title (Tetris Block Party), which is a hard friction — Paper.io 2's UA historically converts on fast, readable territory-capture gameplay loops, not lifestyle skits. The palette overlaps only on #FFD700 and the hoodie/bedroom aesthetic clashes with the bright, minimalist 3D top-down look. Audience skew (teen/young adult casual) is plausibly compatible, but the cluster is tiny (n=1, single advertiser) and unproven — only worth testing if reshot with Paper.io 2 gameplay swapped into the tablet, otherwise skip.
